sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, description String) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'ClickHouse is fast and scalable.');
UPDATE test_table SET description = 'ClickHouse is extremely fast.' WHERE id = 1;
SELECT id, wordShingleMinHash(description, 4, 8) AS hashes FROM test_table WHERE id = 1;
